acceptedSources.title: Prompt caching - Anthropic
acceptedSources.summary: Official Anthropic documentation on prompt caching, including TTL and pricing details.
acceptedSources.rawExcerpt: Anthropic prompt caching TTL is 5 minutes. Cache reads cost 10% of the base input token price.

evidence.snippet: Anthropic prompt caching TTL is 5 minutes. Cache reads cost 10% of the base input token price.
